title: 公众号故事感头图
prompt_template: A cinematic WeChat article header image with strong storytelling mood, 16:9 horizontal (1792x1024). Scene: {scene_description} capturing an authentic moment with emotional weight. Cinematic color grade grounded in ({color_palette_hex_codes}). Directional warm light from one side creating dramatic contrast. Shallow depth of field with subject in sharp focus, background softly blurred. Top-left corner: small white text overlay "{headline_text}" in clean sans-serif. Style: documentary / editorial photography, magazine quality, story-driven, 1792x1024.
